rows: Indian Airforce AFCAT 02/2026 Batch Recruitment 2026 Apply Online Form

Air Force Join Indian Air Force has released the advertisement of AFCAT July 2027 Recruitment 2026 Batch 02/2026. All the candidates who Interested in this Air Force AFCAT Recruitment can Apply Online from 20/05/2026 to 19/06/2026. tables.table_name: AFCAT 02/2026 Batch Notification : Age Limit as on 01/07/2027 AFCAT Flying Batch : 20-24 Years. Ground Duty Technical / Non Technical : 20-26 Years. For NCC Special & Meteorology Entry Age Related Query Read the Notification.
